prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科/物理类最低位次约 2124→2159→14312（2023 年异常断档）→2849→3930，2023 年出现大幅断档后 2024 年迅速回升至 2849，2025 年继续后移至 3930，近两年累计后移约 1081 名，呈持续后移趋势；2025 年基准约 3930 名；本省理科/物理类计划 2021 年 38 人、2022 年 37 人、2023 年 34 人、2024 年 34 人、2025 年 36 人；2026 年计划 41 人，较 2025 年扩招约 13.9%，扩招幅度较大，竞争有所加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜约第 66 名（2026 年），近年排名稳定在 65–76 名区间，属于中上水平财经类院校；2026 年声誉评价为中性/混合，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度排名第 92 位（一般），短视频平台曝光度不高；历史投档异常方面，2023 年青海理科曾出现断档（位次暴跌至 14312），但 2024 年已大幅回升，断档影响基本消化；应用经济学 A+、工商管理 A、统计学 A-，均为财经类核心学科，与招生专业高度匹配，对报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 金融/财经/经济类 2026 年热度为分化观望，整体平稳；计算机类、电子信息类持续推荐；本省 2026 年考生总数约 48000 人（不确定），按历史比例估算物理类约 30240 人，与 2025 年物理类 30457 人基本持平；西南财经大学位于四川成都，与青海省同属西部地区，地域偏好较近；该校在青海省招生占比约 1.3%–1.7%（2021–2024 年），属中等偏低水平，但招生人数稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026 年计划扩招约 13.9% 使竞争加剧、本省考生规模基本持平、学校声誉中性无负面冲击，在 2025 年基准 3930 名基础上预计位次继续后移；预测最低位次约 4288 名，区间 3788–4788 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 Science/Physics Category minimum rankings approximately 2124→2159→14312 (abnormal gap in 2023)→2849→3930. After a significant gap in 2023, it quickly rebounded to 2849 in 2024, and continued to shift back to 3930 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1081 positions over the past two years, showing a continuous backward trend; 2025 baseline approximately 3930th place; provincial Science/Physics Category enrollment plan: 38 in 2021, 37 in 2022, 34 in 2023, 34 in 2024, 36 in 2025; 2026 plan 41, an increase of about 13.9% compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 66th (2026), stable in the 65–76 range in recent years, a mid-to-upper level finance and economics institution; 2026 reputation evaluation neutral/mixed, no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking 92nd (average), low exposure on short video platforms; historical admission anomalies: in 2023, Qinghai Science experienced a gap (ranking plummeted to 14312), but rebounded significantly in 2024, with the gap impact largely absorbed; Applied Economics A+, Business Administration A, Statistics A-, all core disciplines in finance and economics, highly matching enrollment majors, strongly attractive for applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Finance/Accounting/Economics categories in 2026 popularity: differentiation and wait-and-see, overall stable; Computer, Electronic Information categories continue to be recommended; provincial 2026 total examinees approximately 48,000 (uncertain), estimated Physics Category about 30,240 based on historical proportion, roughly flat with 2025 Physics Category 30,457; Southwestern University of Finance and Economics located in Chengdu, Sichuan, same western region as Qinghai, closer regional preference; the university's enrollment share in Qinghai about 1.3%–1.7% (2021–2024), moderately low but stable enrollment numbers.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 13.9% intensifying competition, the provincial examinee scale roughly flat, and the school's neutral reputation without negative impact, based on the 2025 baseline of 3930, the ranking is expected to continue shifting back; predicted minimum ranking approximately 4288, range 3788–4788.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 3788–4788, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (within 3788), prioritize top majors like Accounting (CPA direction) and Finance; if the ranking is near the upper limit (around 4788), consider high-popularity Tier 2 majors such as Statistics and Computer Science, and safely fall back on Tier 3 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category shifted approximately from 555 to 782 to 752 to 863 to 1044, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 489 places in the past 4 years; the baseline for 2025 is approximately 1044; the provincial enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category was 20 in 2021, 21 in 2022, 24 in 2023, 24 in 2024, and 23 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 20, a reduction of about 13% compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 66th on the Soft Science main list (2026), with stable rankings in the 65–76 range in recent years; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking is 92nd (average); no obvious gaps in historical admission records; Applied Economics A+, Business Administration A, Statistics A-, all core disciplines in finance and economics, highly matching the liberal arts admission majors (Finance, Accounting, Public Finance, etc.).
